---
title: Cross-Artifact Consistency Test
---

## Abstract

Our method achieves 95% accuracy and is 3x faster than existing baselines on all benchmarks.

## Introduction

We propose a new approach to image classification with improved efficiency.

## Methods

We train ResNet on the dataset using a standard learning rate schedule.

## Results

The model achieved 87% accuracy on the test set. GPU runtime was reduced compared to the prior pipeline.

## References

- Smith et al. (2020). Image classification baselines. ICML.
